name: MinIO
description: S3-compatible object storage with a web console.
compose:
name: "slashnode-minio"
services:
  minio:
    image: "minio/minio:latest"
    container_name: "minio"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: "server /data --console-address :9001"
    ports:
      - "9000:9000"
      - "9001:9001"
    volumes:
      - "minio-data:/data"
    environment:
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: "${input.MINIO_ROOT_USER}"
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: "${secret.MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD}"
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  minio-data:
    name: "slashnode-minio_minio_minio-data"
